title: Avenger of the Seven Seas
writer: Ugo Guerra, Luciano Martino, Ernesto Gastaldi
actors: Michèle Mercier, Richard Harrison, Roldano Lupi
plot: It's 1790 and British Naval Commander Redway is driven by greed for money and will stop at nothing to get it. His second in command, David Robinson, questions his allegiance when Redway kills his father and takes his brother priso...
